particulars.description: A legal mortgage over the freehold property known as. Land adjoining unit 2, east percy street, north shields. Hm land registry title number(s) TY513001.
A fixed and floating charge over all assets.

The l/h property known as 33 hopper street west north shields tyne & wear,. With the benefit of all rights licences guarantees rent deposits contracts deeds undertakings and warranties relating. To the property any shares or membership rights in any management company for the property any goodwill of any business from time to time carried on at the property any rental and other money payable under any lease licence or other interest created in respect of the property and all other payments whatever in respect of the property.

secured_details.description: All monies but limited to £48750 and all other monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
